name: exerly-fitness-monorepo
description: Exerly Fitness - Monorepo with backend, web, and mobile apps

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,web,mobile -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:mobile"
scripts.local: concurrently -n backend,web -c blue,green "npm run local:backend" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.local:all: concurrently -n backend,web,mobile -c blue,green,magenta "npm run local:backend" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:mobile"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../web && npm install && cd ../mobile && npm install
